query: Tune a slow D1 query without changing schema or migration files.
This Worker does N+1 D1 lookups in a loop and I need to rewrite the query path without touching migrations.
Rewrite this Cloudflare D1 pagination query so it stops over-fetching, but keep the same result shape.
Add a new index to this D1 table and promote the migration safely.
Fix the missing preview_database_id in wrangler.jsonc so the Worker boots again.
Change a Postgres repository adapter query without touching the domain interface.
